name: DeepSeek-TUI
description: Coding agent for DeepSeek models that runs in your terminal
key_features: Auto mode — chooses both model and thinking level per turn
Thinking-mode streaming — see DeepSeek reasoning blocks
Full tool suite — file ops, shell, git, web, MCP, sub-agents
HTTP/SSE runtime API for headless workflows
Skills system — installable instruction packs from GitHub
use_cases: Terminal-based coding agent for DeepSeek V4
Auto mode for adaptive model selection

installation.cargo: cargo install deepseek-tui-cli --locked && cargo install deepseek-tui --locked
installation.homebrew: brew tap Hmbown/deepseek-tui && brew install deepseek-tui
